search_query: how to start a YouTube channel
retrieved_result: More Than 50 New Shows Are Coming To TV This Fall by Kirsten Acuna, May 15, 2013. The article discusses upcoming TV series on major networks for the fall season.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about TV shows coming to television, not about creating or managing a YouTube channel.
